integrations.integration1_desc: Seamless connection with your existing tools and workflows.
integrations.integration2_desc: Flexible API for custom integrations with any system.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Your Brand is a platform that helps you achieve X by doing Y.
faq.a2: Our platform connects directly with your existing tools via standardized APIs and protocols.
faq.a3: Yes, security is our priority. We meet strict security standards and use encrypted data transfer.

contact.title: Have questions?
contact.subtitle: Write to us and we will get back to you.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: We received your message and will get back to you shortly.
contact.error: An error occurred while sending. Please try again later.
contact.error_validation: Please check your input and try again.
contact.error_rate_limit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
contact.error_network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
contact.validation_name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters.
contact.validation_name_max: Name must be at most 100 characters.
contact.validation_company_max: Company name must be at most 100 characters.
contact.validation_message_min: Message must be at least 10 characters.
contact.validation_message_max: Message must be at most 2000 characters.

demo.title: Try the platform demo
demo.success: Thank you! Our team will contact you soon.

cookie.title: Privacy and Cookies
cookie.desc: This website uses cookies to ensure proper functionality and analyze traffic. You can choose which categories to allow.
cookie.cat_necessary_desc: Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.
cookie.cat_analytics_desc: Help us understand how visitors interact with the website.
cookie.cat_marketing_desc: Used to display relevant advertisements and measure campaign effectiveness.
cookie.cat_personalization_desc: Allow content and ads to be tailored to your interests.

footer.description: A brief description of your brand and what it does. Replace this with your actual footer copy.
